name: Halvorsen Team - LoanPeople
description_short: Halvorsen Team is a Jacksonville-based mortgage lender offering home purchase, refinance, and renovation loans across Florida, Georgia, and West Virginia with a focus on fast closings and personalized service.
description_long:
Halvorsen Team operates under LoanPeople and is led by Daniel Halvorsen, a top 0.001% mortgage originator nationally recognized as a Scotsman Guide Top Originator. The team includes Nick Dalcero, Shea Peck, and Will Wyatt, collectively serving the mortgage market for over a decade. Daniel Halvorsen has personally funded over $800 million in loan volume through a referral-based marketing approach, and the team earned the #1 ranking for Affordable Lending in Florida and the #1 Retail Mortgage Lender in Jacksonville according to Core Logic and Zonda.

The company specializes in home purchase loans, refinances, and renovation financing with emphasis on fast closings and consistent communication throughout the loan process. They are licensed in Florida, Georgia, and West Virginia (NMLS 788842) and market themselves as offering five-star service with competitive rates.

What distinguishes Halvorsen Team is their track record in affordable lending and their reputation for handling complex situations. Customer reviews highlight loan officers like Shea Peck for going beyond typical loan officer duties—including intervening when real estate brokers and attorneys were not acting in clients' best interests, protecting clients from unfavorable contract terms and fee discrepancies. The team is also noted for responsiveness, precise information delivery, and a down-to-earth approach despite their top-tier status.

The primary limitation is geographic scope—they only operate in three states (FL, GA, WV) and appear to focus heavily on the Jacksonville/Florida market. While customer testimonials are uniformly positive (all 5-star reviews on their website from January 2026), the website provides minimal detail on loan programs, specific rates, APRs, or product offerings beyond the category names "Purchase" and "Refinance."

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Daniel Halvorsen ranked in top 0.001% of lenders nationwide with Scotsman Guide Top Originator recognition
Licensed in three states (FL, GA, WV) with NMLS 788842 and clear team member identification
Earned #1 ranking for Affordable Lending in entire state of Florida (Affordable Housing Finance Corporation)
#1 Retail Mortgage Lender in Jacksonville per Core Logic & Zonda rankings
Loan officers documented for going beyond typical duties (Shea Peck example: intervened to protect clients from predatory broker/attorney practices)
Fast closing times emphasized across marketing materials and customer reviews
Over $800 million in personal loan volume funded demonstrates substantial experience and capability
cons: Limited geographic availability—only operates in Florida, Georgia, and West Virginia, not nationwide
Website lacks specific program details, rate information, APR ranges, or loan terms comparisons
No information on minimum credit score requirements, down payment minimums, or qualification criteria
All customer reviews on website dated 01/24/2026-01/30/2026 appear clustered without historical depth or third-party verification sources
No mention of automated pre-qualification tools, online application tracking, or digital closing capabilities
best_for: Florida, Georgia, or West Virginia homebuyers seeking referral-based mortgage services with emphasis on responsive, personalized attention
Borrowers with complex mortgage situations (reverse mortgages, pre-foreclosure, multi-party complications) who need loan officers willing to advocate beyond standard duties
Real estate agents and builder partners in Jacksonville/Florida markets seeking reliable, fast-closing lender partnerships
diagnosis: Halvorsen Team is best for homebuyers in Florida, Georgia, or West Virginia who value personalized service and responsiveness from a top-performing mortgage originator, particularly those with complex financing needs or referrals from trusted agents. The main caveat is that their geographic limitation and sparse online product information make it essential to contact them directly for rate quotes, program details, and qualification assessment.
services: Complex loan situation handling (reverse mortgages, pre-foreclosure scenarios)
Customer communication and coordination throughout loan process
Real estate agent partnership and support
Phone, email, and online contact support
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
